commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(serp): make SerpAPI diagnostics visible in production logs

All SERP diagnostic logging was gated behind NODE_ENV=development,
causing silent failures in production. When SERP_API_KEY is missing,
rate limited, or returning errors, Vercel logs showed nothing — just
0 results with no explanation.

Now logs key events unconditionally: entry params, cache hits, HTTP
errors with response bodies, per-query result counts, and summary.

.claude 프레임워크 전면 개편 및 자기개선 시스템 설치

- 에이전트: 범용 9개 삭제, PompCore 전용 12개 생성 (architect, reviewer, frontend 등)
- 스킬: PompCore 도메인 스킬 9개 생성 (forge, vault, quest, platform 등)

- 커맨드: PompCore 전용 10개 생성 (create-feature, review-architecture 등)
- 템플릿: 4개 생성 (feature-spec, table-spec, patch-note, adr)
- 메모리: 영속 메모리 시스템 설치 (platform, architecture, domains, decisions)
- 개선: AI 자기개선 루프 설치 (observations, bottlenecks, prompt-patches, system-rules)
- CLAUDE.md: 모노레포 패키지 목록 실제와 일치, 소유권 조회 테이블 추가, 스택 버전 상세화
- bootstrap.md: 계층적 컨텍스트 로딩 시스템 + 사전 검증 규칙 추가
- error-tracking: 다른 프로젝트 경로를 PompCore 모노레포 경로로 교체

commit.message:
Recalibrate ring and display for 5000-class model

Simplify ring to two phases: audio buffer (0-60%) + tune locked (60-100%).
Remove fragile stability phase that never filled with 5000 classes.
Stop clearing hero tune on silence — keep last prediction visible.
Stop clearing hero on silence→music transitions.
Ring now reliably reaches 100% once a tune is identified.

commit.message:
refactor(extractor): use NewExtractor factory functions (#15)

* refactor(extractor): use NewExtractor factory functions

Add NewExtractor() constructors for spring, gozero, and grpcprotoc
extractors. This ensures all dependencies are initialized at creation
time, making nil checks in methods redundant.

Also remove e2e build tag from grpc_protoc_test.go to allow running
with standard go test.

skill(claude-code-optimizer): update references against official docs + remove stale reports

References corrected against https://code.claude.com/docs:

hooks_guide.md:
- Expand event table from 4 to 16 events (UserPromptSubmit, PermissionRequest,
  PostToolUseFailure, Notification, SubagentStart/Stop, TeammateIdle, TaskCompleted,
  InstructionsLoaded, ConfigChange, WorktreeCreate/Remove, PreCompact, SessionEnd)
- Fix "exit 2 = block" misconception — blocking requires JSON permissionDecision output
- Add http handler type and all common handler fields (timeout, statusMessage, once, async)
- Add configuration JSON format with matcher groups
- Add matcher field documentation and per-event matcher values
- Add skill/agent frontmatter as a hook scope

skill_structure.md:
- Fix: name is optional (defaults to directory name), not required
- Fix: user-invocable: false means Claude can still auto-trigger; description IS in context
- Add missing keys: argument-hint, model, agent, hooks
- Add substitution variables: $ARGUMENTS[N], $N, ${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}, ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}
- Add !command dynamic context injection
- Add invocation/context-loading table from official docs
- Add skill description 16K char budget note
- Add legacy .claude/commands/ compatibility and plugin scope

claude_md_guide.md:
- Add managed policy CLAUDE.md location (macOS/Linux paths)
- Add CLAUDE.local.md (local per-project, gitignored)
- Add .claude/rules/ path-scoped rules with paths frontmatter
- Add @path import syntax
- Add claudeMdExcludes setting
- Clarify CLAUDE.md loads in full (no hard line limit, 200 is a best-practice target)
- Clarify subdirectory CLAUDE.md files load on demand, not at session start
- Clarify auto-memory topic files load on demand, not at startup
- Add MEMORY.md as index + topic files architecture

automation_patterns.md:

Also removes stale optimizer reports from docs/claude-code-optimizer/.

fix: reorder auth flow and persist OpenRouter API key (#2320)

* fix: reorder auth flow and persist OpenRouter API key across retries

Two onboarding issues reported by users:

1. After DigitalOcean OAuth, the message said "OpenRouter authentication
   in 5s..." but then a GitHub CLI prompt appeared first. Fix: move API
   key acquisition immediately after cloud auth, before preProvision
   hooks (which include the GitHub prompt). Remove the misleading 5s
   delay message.

2. On retry after billing failure, DigitalOcean token was remembered but
   the OpenRouter API key was lost (only stored in process.env). Fix:
   persist the key to ~/.config/spawn/openrouter.json and load it on
   subsequent runs, matching how cloud tokens are already persisted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add mode 0o700 to config dir and await saveOpenRouterKey

- Add mode: 0o700 to mkdirSync in saveOpenRouterKey to match other cloud
  modules (aws, hetzner, digitalocean) and prevent directory permission leak
- Add missing await on saveOpenRouterKey(manualKey) to ensure manual API
  keys persist to disk before the function returns

feat(skill): add arxiv-reader skill (#19)

* feat(skill): add arxiv-reader skill for reading arXiv papers

Add a new builtin skill that wraps the container's arxiv-server (port 8082)
with three tools: arxiv_fetch, arxiv_sections, and arxiv_abstract.

Canonical source lives at skills/arxiv-reader/ with a re-export in
docker/plugin/prismer-workspace/skills/arxiv-reader/ for plugin discovery.

Also adds prismer-arxiv CLI wrapper and updates AGENTS.md, catalog.ts,
and find-skills index.ts for full integration.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

* feat(skill): add latex-compiler skill for LaTeX document compilation

Add a new builtin skill wrapping the container's LaTeX server (port 8080)
with four tools: latex_compile, latex_preview, latex_templates, and
latex_get_template. Supports pdflatex/xelatex/lualatex engines and
bibliography processing.

Canonical source at skills/latex-compiler/ with re-export in
docker/plugin/prismer-workspace/skills/latex-compiler/.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

* feat(skill): make arxiv-reader standalone (no Docker/Python required)

The arxiv-reader skill now works in two modes:
- Standalone: fetches directly from arXiv using Node.js built-ins
  (https, zlib for gunzip, custom tar parser, LaTeX flattening)
- Container: delegates to arXiv server (port 8082) if available

Standalone mode includes:
- Download and decompress arXiv e-print source (tar.gz)
- Parse tar archive to extract .tex files
- Find main .tex file (by \documentclass)
- Flatten \input{}/\include{} recursively
- Strip comments, appendix, and figure environments
- Extract sections and abstract via regex
- Local file cache (~/.cache/arxiv-reader/)
- Abstract fast-path via arXiv Atom API

* fix: update repository URL from prismer/pisa-os to Prismer-AI/Prismer in all manifests

* feat(skill): add formal-methods skill for Lean 4, Coq, and Z3

Add a new builtin skill wrapping the container's prover server (port 8081)
with five tools: lean_check, coq_check, coq_compile, z3_solve, and
prover_status. Supports dual-mode operation: container server or local
prover binaries via subprocess.

Canonical source at skills/formal-methods/ with re-export in
docker/plugin/prismer-workspace/skills/formal-methods/.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

commit.message:
Inline CheckError and IndexField null fast path in Cranelift codegen

- CheckError: read JIT_ERROR_FLAG directly from memory instead of
  calling jit_rt_has_error(). Eliminates function call overhead on
  every fallible operation.
- IndexField: short-circuit null.field → null without runtime call.
  Speeds up null propagation patterns like .a.b.c? on null inputs.
